subcodes.first_line: The heavenly sustenance is the knowledge of God, and His everlasting bounty is His wondrous and glorious remembrance, and the verses are His [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مائده السماء هی عرفان الله و نعمته الباقیه هی ذکره العزیز البدیع و الایات هن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital
